auth.login_subtitle: Shiga don ci gaba da kwarewa mai kyau.
auth.register_subtitle: Samun tafiya mai inganci da tsaro.
auth.agree_to_terms: Na yarda da duk Sharuɗɗa da Manufofin Sirri
auth.invalid_phone: Da fatan a shigar da lambar waya mai inganci.
auth.reset_password_subtitle: Shigar da lambar waya da ke da alaƙa da asusunka kuma za mu aika maka lambar sake saita.
auth.otp_subtitle: Rubuta lambar OTP mai lamba 6 da aka aika maka.
auth.invalid_otp: Da fatan a shigar da lambar lamba 6 mai inganci.
auth.create_new_password_subtitle: Zaɓi kalmar sirri mai tsaro da za ka tuna.
auth.password_too_short: Kalmar sirri dole ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 6.
auth.passwords_dont_match: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba.

profile_setup.role_selection_title: Yaya kake shirin amfani da Chauffly?
profile_setup.passenger_description: Jin daɗinka, tsaroka, da kwanciyar hankalinka a koyaushe.
profile_setup.driver_description: Tuki da mutunci, ƙwararru, da yuwuwar samun kuɗi mai yawa.
profile_setup.corporate_description: Tafiye-tafiyen da aka tsara sosai don ƙungiyarka da abokan ciniki.
profile_setup.ride_style_placeholder: Zaɓi nau'in tafiya da ya dace da matakin jin daɗinka
profile_setup.accessibility_options_placeholder: Sanar da direban idan kana buƙatar ƙarin taimako
profile_setup.facial_verification_description: Don tsaroka, muna amfani da gane fuska don tabbatar da kai ne a lokacin ɗaukar kaya da ayyukan asusun. Ana ɓoye bayanan fuskarka kuma ana adana su cikin aminci.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_1: Ɗauki fuskata sau ɗaya yayin saita.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_2: Ana amfani da shi don tabbatarwa kawai ba a taɓa raba shi da direbobi ba.
profile_setup.facial_bullet_3: Kana iya kashe wannan a kowane lokaci a Saituna.
profile_setup.facial_verification_success_description: An yi rajistar fuskarka cikin aminci. Za mu yi amfani da ita don sauri da amintaccen tabbatarwa yayin tafiye-tafiye.

onboarding.slide1_title:
Barka da zuwa chauffly
Tafiya da Kwarin Gwiwa
onboarding.slide1_description: Jin daɗin tafiye-tafiye masu inganci, direbobi abin dogaro, da kwarewar tafiya da aka tsara don jin daɗi da tsaro.
onboarding.slide2_title: Alatu, Kowane Lokaci da Kake Bukata
onboarding.slide2_description: Zaɓi daga Go, Plus, Luxe, ko Black — tafiye-tafiye da aka daidaita daidai da kowane lokaci, daga ayyukan yau da kullum zuwa tafiyar zartarwa.
onboarding.slide3_description: Direbobi da aka tabbatar, bin diddigin lokaci na gaske, gane fuska, da raba nan take suna kiyaye kowace tafiya cikin tsaro.
